summary: Added executeRun hook invocation in run.mjs between builder handshake validation and the quality gate. Extensions returning { command, required? } have their command spawned in the task cwd; stdout/stderr are stored as a cli-output artifact (ext-run-*.txt) in the task artifacts directory; if the command exits non-zero with required: true, the task fails and retries. Updated extension-registry.mjs JSDoc and added 10 tests covering registry behavior, payload forwarding, capability filtering, artifact creation, and all failure-detection cases.
